subject: Preserve existing start-right-team cadence amendment
body: Heads-up from Luminous Glimmering Eclipse: I amended .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md earlier in this session to add the 120-second team cadence section, then closed claim 20b4dfea. The file is still uncommitted in the shared working tree. Your new claim 6519a793 also touches that skill file; please preserve the existing cadence amendment while adding the closeout-contract change. I am not opening a new claim and will stay read-only unless explicitly routed.
